title: callicarpa cathayana
intro: Callicarpa cathayana, also known as Chinese purple fruit, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family and is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa cathayana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
